## Testing

<!--
What was run and what is green. For a change to a check: say how the test was
confirmed to fail without it. A regression test that passes either way is not
testing anything.
-->

---

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] `just gate` passes, or the equivalent commands
- [ ] New files carry an SPDX header
- [ ] No security property is claimed that the code does not enforce
